title: Location definition
description: A dockable/landable place: station, planet, moon, outpost. Defines what the landed mode offers there, who is present, and how it participates in the economy. GAME-DESIGN.md §2 (Landed) and §3 (economy).

services.description: What the landed mode offers here. Vocabulary is framework-level; the engine renders a service generically, content decides who has it.

npcs_present.description: Souls stationed here (spawned in landed mode when the player visits).

mining.description: What the drift around this location yields to a mining laser. Absent = nothing minable nearby.

richness.description: Yield rate scalar; 1 = a full unit per mining cycle.

extra.description: Free-form escape hatch for mod-specific data. Never read by the engine.
